prompt: a window XP UI found in the industry automation pipeline manufacturing GPUs, the UI shows how the soldering status of the board
prompt_refined: A detailed screenshot of a Windows XP user interface on an industrial monitor. The UI, rendered in the classic Windows XP theme with its blue taskbar and grey window frames, displays a comprehensive 'Soldering Status' application. This application prominently features a real-time schematic of a circuit board, with individual solder points clearly marked: green for successful connections and red for defects. Digital readouts for temperature and flux levels, along with a progress bar for overall completion, are also visible. The background subtly reveals an automated industrial setting, hinting at a GPU manufacturing pipeline with blurred machinery.
objects: Real-time schematic of a circuit board
Automated industrial setting with blurred machinery
